headlines.description: A Nicolas Pépé brace powered Ivory Coast to a 2-0 win over Curacao.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ivory Coast make WC knockouts for the first time with 2-0 win over Curaçao

headlines.description: Ecuador produced a rousing fightback to come from behind and beat Germany 2-1 in their final Group E match in New Jersey to put themselves into the last 32 of the World Cup.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ecuador stun Germany to enter World Cup knockouts

headlines.description: Japan and Sweden booked their places in the knockout phase of the World Cup as they drew 1-1 in their final Group F clash in Dallas.
headlines.shortLinkText: Japan, Sweden share points, book knockout spots

headlines.description: Brian Brobbey scored his third goal of the World Cup, the Netherlands got a pair of goals that deflected off Tunisia into its own net, and the Dutch rolled in the rain to a 3-1 victory Thursday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Netherlands see off Tunisia, set up Morocco clash
